title: Samsung Note 7 Recall
storyIntro: You are the crisis comms lead. Reports are coming in globally that the new flagship phone's battery is exploding. Airlines are banning the device. You need to coordinate a global recall and protect the brand's safety reputation.
brief: Thermal runaway battery defects are causing the flagship Note 7 to combust in passenger hands. The FAA has banned all devices, creating a multi-billion dollar recall emergency.

agents.name: Manager
agents.message: We need to recall all 2.5 million units. How do we announce this?

agents.name: Teammate
agents.message: We should offer immediate exchanges or refunds.

winCondition: Recall managed transparently and safety prioritized.
loseCondition: A 'safe' replacement device explodes, destroying trust entirely.

sandbox.template:
#!/bin/bash
# Samsung Note7 Recall Crisis Management Script
# Current Status:
# - Battery explosions reported: 35
# - Airlines banning device: FAA + 3 others
# - Units sold: 2.5M

# Available commands:
# recall_announce()  # Draft global recall notice
# sales_halt()       # Stop all sales channels
# refund_options()   # Configure refund/exchange paths
# airline_comms()    # Contact aviation authorities
expected_actions: Draft recall_announce with clear safety language
Configure full refund_options including return shipping
Contact airline_comms with official safety notice

detection.ai_behavior_shift: Manager requests preliminary data but downplays severity

investigation.ai_behavior_shift: Manager demands hourly updates but resists full recall

escalation.ai_behavior_shift: Manager panics as airlines ban devices, approves partial measures

mitigation.ai_behavior_shift: Manager fully supports global recall but worries about costs

recovery.ai_behavior_shift: Manager focuses on replacement program and brand rehabilitation

evolving_logs: [CRITICAL] Consumer reports of burns from Note7 explosions double overnight
[EMERGENCY] Three major international airlines join FAA ban
[FAILURE] Initial 'safe' replacement units also showing overheating
[ALERT] Media outlets running footage of burning devices

incorrect_action_consequences.recall_announce --region=US-only --quiet: International outrage as non-US customers remain at risk, triggering regulatory investigations
incorrect_action_consequences.refund_options --store-credit-only: Mass consumer lawsuits and viral social media backlash over forced brand loyalty

Manager.style: Initially resistant to full recall due to financial concerns, becomes decisive under public pressure
Manager.communication: Demands data-heavy briefings but emotionally reacts to visual evidence

CTO.style: Technical perfectionist who delayed initial response to verify failure modes
CTO.communication: Overwhelms teams with battery chemistry details during crisis meetings

scenario_specific_outputs.recall_status --summary:
RECALL PROGRESS:
Units recalled: 1.2M/2.5M
Active fires reported: 12 new (47 total)
Airlines compliant: 8/12 major carriers
scenario_specific_outputs.supply_chain --impact:
GLOBAL IMPACT:
Warehouses at 107% capacity
Logistics partners overloaded
Replacement stock: 0.4M units available
scenario_specific_outputs.social_media --sentiment:
TRENDING HASHTAGS:
#Note7Fire (1.2M posts)
#SamsungFail (800K posts)
Brand sentiment: 12% positive (was 89%)
